'''Trace''' was a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] and the small-arms expert of [[Ion Team]] in the [[22nd Air Combat Wing]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Trace, the spec-two of [[Ion Team]], served as the squad's small-arms expert and was led by [[Clone Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Climber (clone)|Climber]]. During the assault on the shield generator,<ref name="Rise of Vader" /> he<ref name="Encyclopedia" /> accompanied [[Bol Chatak]] and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Olee Starstone]], while Climber secured the generator. Later, when the clones received orders from [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to execute [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], commanding them to eliminate the Jedi, Trace, along with the rest of Ion Team, refused to execute the Jedi and decided to help them escape. Trace and the other members of Ion Team ambushed [[Clone Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Salvo (clone trooper)|Salvo's]] attempt to carry out Order 66, Ion Team used [[Electromagnetic pulse grenade/Legends|electrostatic charge detonators]] to disable the electronic systems in Salvo and his men's armor and weapons. When [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] came to Murkhana, the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] accused the team of [[Treason/Legends|treason]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Rise of Vader" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Trace appeared in the [[2005]] novel, ''[[Dark Lord: The Rise of Darth Vader]]''.<ref name="Rise of Vader" />
